name: Ayali
overview: Young Tamizhselvi dreams of becoming a doctor. But her village, Veerappannai, has fearsome age-old customs and traditions which inadvertently suppress women of the village. Will she be able to overcome them?

trailers.title: AYALI | A ZEE5 Original | Official Trailer | Muthukumar | Premieres 26th January 2023
